rule: All terms are planned reference terms. No term may be published without source validation. This ontology governs all content, language, and terminology decisions.

terms.industrial_signal: chemical terminology, procurement language, German-language industrial chemistry
terms.safety_context: requires source validation before any safety statements are made
terms.notes: Center node of the bisulfid.com ontology. German-form spelling of bisulfide. The conceptual and linguistic anchor of the asset. Center node source support remains candidate. Current source supports German technical usage only; stronger dictionary, nomenclature, regulatory, or academic source still required.

terms.industrial_signal: English-language chemical procurement, IUPAC nomenclature reference
terms.safety_context: requires source validation before any safety statements are made
terms.notes: English-form spelling. Planned reference term. Relationship to bisulfid is the spelling boundary that defines the asset.

terms.industrial_signal: German-language industrial chemistry, European chemical authority
terms.safety_context: requires source validation before any safety statements are made
terms.notes: German-form spelling of sulfide. Demonstrates the chemical compression pattern: Sulfide to Sulfid.

terms.industrial_signal: English-language chemical industry, broad industrial relevance
terms.safety_context: requires source validation before any safety statements are made
terms.notes: English-form spelling. Broad chemical family term. Planned reference term.

terms.industrial_signal: industrial chemical procurement, sodium hydrosulfide supply chain
terms.safety_context: requires source validation before any safety statements are made
terms.notes: Planned reference term. Chemical relationship to bisulfide requires source validation. Used in industrial procurement naming.

terms.industrial_signal: sour gas processing, oil and gas refining, industrial hazard
terms.safety_context: acutely hazardous gas. Safety content published as context only — not prescriptive advice. No handling instructions. No exposure thresholds as advice.
terms.notes: Planned reference term. High risk designation. Safety content governance applies. No prescriptive safety thresholds may be published without source validation.

terms.industrial_signal: mining, water treatment, leather industry, industrial chemical procurement
terms.safety_context: industrial chemical with hazard profile. Safety content published as context only. No handling instructions.
terms.notes: Planned reference term. High risk: industrial chemical. Safety governance applies. No handling instructions permitted. Candidate source supports synonym/identity relationship with sodium hydrosulfide.

terms.industrial_signal: alternative procurement name for NaHS, sodium bisulfide naming convention
terms.safety_context: industrial chemical with hazard profile. Safety content published as context only. No handling instructions.
terms.notes: Planned reference term. Alternative IUPAC-preferred name for sodium bisulfide. Naming relationship requires source validation.

terms.chemical_field: inorganic and organic chemistry, biochemistry, materials science
terms.industrial_signal: lubricants, advanced materials, biochemistry, rubber chemistry
terms.safety_context: context-dependent by compound. No general prescriptive statements.
terms.notes: Planned reference term. Covers disulfide bonds in biochemistry and industrial disulfide compounds.

terms.safety_context: context-dependent by compound. No prescriptive statements.
terms.notes: German-form spelling of disulfide. Demonstrates the compression pattern. No dedicated public page planned in EN v1.

terms.industrial_signal: lubricants, electronics, advanced materials, industrial coatings
terms.safety_context: low acute risk as a solid material in common industrial forms. No prescriptive safety statements without source validation.
terms.notes: Planned reference term. Key future-materials node. Extends asset into advanced industrial materials.

terms.industrial_signal: chemical formula alias for molybdenum disulfide in scientific and procurement contexts
terms.notes: Formula alias. Points to molybdenum_disulfide page. Not a separate spatial node.

terms.chemical_field: inorganic chemistry, food science — distinct from bisulfide
terms.industrial_signal: food preservation, wine industry, bleaching — not related to bisulfide industrial uses
terms.safety_context: distinct hazard profile from bisulfide. Must not be conflated with bisulfide safety context.
terms.notes: Disambiguation term only. Bisulfite is NOT bisulfide. This node exists to prevent conflation. Bisulfite data must never be used as bisulfide data.

terms.industrial_signal: fertilizer production, petroleum refining, rubber vulcanization, chemical feedstock
terms.safety_context: context-dependent by form and use case. No prescriptive statements.
terms.notes: The foundational element. Public gateway term. Not a spatial node in the Interactive Term Map — the map centers on bisulfid, not sulfur.
